Interface IFieldInfo

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to properties that give extended information on the field.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("A2BAAE2C-969B-11D2-AE77-080009EC732A")]
public interface IFieldInfo

Properties

Alias

The alias for the field.

string Alias { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

AsString[object]

The string representation of a given value based on the current field information.

string AsString[object Value] { get; }

Parameters

Value object

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Highlight

Indicates how the field should be presented.

bool Highlight { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

NumberFormat

The number format for the field (invalid if non-numeric field).

INumberFormat NumberFormat { get; set; }

Property Value

INumberFormat

Examples

Sample Snippet

Readonly

Indicates how the field should be presented.

bool Readonly { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ValueAsRatio

Indicates if the field value should be the ratio of itself.

bool ValueAsRatio { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Visible

Indicates if the field is visible.

bool Visible { get; set; }
